query: SELECT r.id, r.name, CAST(r.passportOcrData AS CHAR) as ocr_data, r.phone, r.nationality as reg_nationality, pi.passportNumber as pi_passport, pi.fullName as pi_name, pi.birthDate as pi_birth, pi.gender as pi_gender, pi.nationality as pi_nationality, pi.expiryDate as pi_expiry FROM registrations r LEFT JOIN passport_info pi ON UPPER(TRIM(r.name)) = UPPER(TRIM(pi.fullName)) WHERE r.id >= 630001 AND r.id <= 630037 ORDER BY r.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT r.id, r.name, CAST(r.passportOcrData AS CHAR) as ocr_data, r.phone, r.nationality as reg_nationality, pi.passportNumber as pi_passport, pi.fullName as pi_name, pi.birthDate as pi_birth, pi.gender as pi_gender, pi.nationality as pi_nationality, pi.expiryDate as pi_expiry FROM registrations r LEFT JOIN passport_info pi ON UPPER(TRIM(r.name)) = UPPER(TRIM(pi.fullName)) WHERE r.id >= 630001 AND r.id <= 630037 ORDER BY r.id LIMIT 20;
